action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline AP 0.025 with feature MLP, loss NaN, AP static across epochs (no learning). Aggregated features lose graph structure. Analysis: GNN with message passing necessary for competitive performance. Previous segfaults likely due to DataLoader multiprocessing/memory issues; pipeline stable now. Remaining 4.87h and 12 iterations allow GNN training on subset. Decision: Implement GINE model (edge-aware GIN), train on 50k subset for 10 epochs to verify stability and improve AP. Use num_workers=0, batch_size=64. Update predict.py accordingly. Submit eval after training.
